name: nginx-multisite
description: Nginx reverse proxy with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, global security hardening (fail2ban, UFW firewall, kernel sysctl tuning), SSH hardening, and per-site self-signed TLS certificate generation. Implements HTTP→HTTPS redirects, TLS 1.2/1.3-only ciphers, HSTS, and a full suite of security response headers across all virtual hosts.

name: cache
description: Provisions a dual in-memory caching layer using Memcached (via the upstream community cookbook) and Redis (via redisio) with password authentication on port 6379. Includes a post-install ruby_block workaround that strips deprecated Redis configuration directives to ensure compatibility with the installed Redis version.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: End-to-end deployment of a Python FastAPI application sourced from a public GitHub repository, including system package provisioning, Python virtual environment setup, PostgreSQL database and user creation, a .env file with the database connection string, and a systemd unit file that starts the application via uvicorn on port 8000.
